FX.title: Countdown to 162? AI Analytics Signals USD/JPY Upside Amid Geopolitical De‑Escalation
tldr_points: Iran cease‑fire talks ease risk premium
USD strength supported by resilient yields
FX.excerpt: USD/JPY poised for upside as geopolitical risk fades and yields diverge, targeting 162‑164 range.
FX.comment: Yield spread and reduced geopolitical risk favor a bullish breakout above 161.80.

STOCKS.title: Market Outlook: S&P 500 Upside Catalysts Identified
tldr_points: Rate environment tightening reinforcing premium positions.
Continued earnings momentum supports directional bias.
Short-term retest of key support levels increases probability.
STOCKS.excerpt: Key indicators point to a favorable shift for the index.
STOCKS.comment: Key indicators point to a favorable shift for the index.

CRYPTO.title: BTC/USD Poised for Asymmetrical Breakout Amid AI Mining Surge and ETF Catalysts
tldr_points: AI-driven crypto sector surge reinforces BTC’s institutional retail hybrid demand
Goldman Sachs Bitcoin ETF filing lowers regulatory uncertainty risk
Order book imbalance favors bulls at $70,000–$73,000 zone
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD trims above $72,000 amid AI miner rally; key trendline confluences amplify short-term upside potential. Ethereum ETF delays narrow focus on Bitcoin’s $75k resistance.
CRYPTO.comment: Asymmetric risk-reward ratio from AI mining-driven demand and ETF catalyst tailwinds.
